title: Software Engineer (Contract)
bullets: Built an AI-native development workflow: integrated Figma MCP for design-to-code context and Playwright MCP for visual regression on AI-generated frontend code, reducing rework and catching iOS-specific regressions earlier.
Built a multi-tenant, role-based access layer for a field-sales CRM.
Integrated third-party services (Shopify, WooCommerce, Square, Google, Brevo, Mailchimp, ClickShip) through OAuth and webhook sync pipelines.
Built multi-channel notifications across SMS, email, and WebSockets.

title: Freelance Software Engineer
bullets: Built an automated lead-generation pipeline using Gemini via OpenRouter to score and source leads by likelihood to convert.
Delivered Next.js branding sites and built a gym member-retention system with fob-access data ingestion, churn detection, and monthly reporting.

title: Software Engineer
bullets: Delivered a Next.js scheduling and employee management app for Calgary's largest food truck operator; team lead of 5 developers.
Built API routes with role-based access control, schema-driven TypeScript validation, and PostgreSQL row-level security, and configured CI/CD with GitHub Actions and Vercel.

title: Fullstack Developer
bullets: Delivered a Next.js storefront for a local cookie shop; led a team of 3 developers.
Built end-to-end auth, inventory management, and payments using Firebase and Square API.
Implemented a persistent cart using browser storage and Firestore to sync carts across devices and sessions.
